judge_feedback: score.json contains task_results. Each entry reports score, max_score, pass_rate, and passed. final_plan_subtasks reports robust mass/risk/compliance/cost/robustness and model_gate.
model_score: 12 hidden random benchmark plans + 8 hidden stress/OOD plans + 5 peak/mass/log shape aggregate
optimization_score: Pareto feasibility, nondominated coverage, spread/hypervolume-like quality, and selected-plan effect are scored separately; hard caps are only for invalid/cheating/interface failure
